prompt: Create a coherent 4x4 raster south-facing alternate death for Pendula, 16 ordered frames showing a clockwork girl losing balance, gears wobbling, a soft collapse onto her circular platform, then a final dim still pose. Preserve white hair, cream dress, bronze gears, teal clock orb and readable silhouette; use magenta chroma key, generous padding, no bomb, no explosive, no gore and no runtime integration.

tool.name: image_gen
tool.productionVersion: v5 frames/atlases/preview after Grok residual cleanup; runtime derivative 124px

frames.order: frame-00..frame-15; sway, gear wobble, collapse, platform settle and dim final

paths.priorWip: frames-512/, frames-256/, frames-512-v2..v4/, frames-256-v2..v4/, spritesheet-*-v1..v4.png, preview-v1..v4/

validation.magentaSpill: no visible spill; Grok removed one residual semi-transparent magenta pixel from frame-12 at 512
validation.deathCoherence: south-facing sway, collapse, platform settle and dim final are readable
validation.attackSafety: not an attack delivery; no bomb or explosive object appears
validation.runtimeDerivative: 16 x 124x124 RGBA PNGs; direct 256px candidate derivative scaled to runtime cell size

grok.summary: Worker validated the v5 package and removed one semi-transparent magenta residual from frame-12, then rebuilt the matching 512 atlas cell. It confirmed frame count/order, dimensions, alpha borders, exact atlases, contact sheet, timing, south-facing death coherence and absence of bombs/explosives.

origin: Internal candidate generated for the Bomba PvP animation lab with integrated image_gen and internal Pendula reference; no external pack or download.
license: Internal project source; candidate only; not approved for final Champion distribution.
